exploration_notes: Django's MIDDLEWARE processing is implemented across 5 key files. BaseHandler.load_middleware() in base.py is the core: it iterates settings.MIDDLEWARE in reverse, wrapping each middleware around the next via a chain pattern (innermost is _get_response, outermost is _middleware_chain). convert_exception_to_response() in exception.py wraps each middleware layer for exception handling. WSGIHandler (wsgi.py) and ASGIHandler (asgi.py) are the concrete handlers that call load_middleware() and serve a
